audit_type: Round 4 hidden-bug hunt + 2 cross-CMD inbox fixes

rounds.evidence: {left: shared, right: shared} → right slot stamped as CIRCULAR sentinel. DAG pattern with shared sub-object is legitimate, not a cycle. Round 1's WeakSet-based 'seen' detection over-flagged.
rounds.fix: Changed `seen: WeakSet` semantics to `path: WeakSet` (path-set). Add on enter, REMOVE on exit. Only true back-edges (currently in stack) flagged as CIRCULAR.

rounds.evidence: {[Symbol('secret_key')]: 'evil_payload', x: 1} hashed identically to {x: 1} — Object.keys() skips symbol keys; my prepareForJson didn't walk Object.getOwnPropertySymbols().
rounds.fix: Walk enumerable own symbol keys via Object.getOwnPropertySymbols(); emit as CANON_KEY_SYMBOL_PREFIX + description.

rounds.evidence: sched.begin({auraGuard:{}}, 1) → 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading encounterId)'. Caller can't tell adapter requires CombatRuntime built via createCombatRuntime().
rounds.fix: assertValidRuntime() — clear error 'runtime.config is missing — expected CombatRuntime built via createCombatRuntime()' + non-string encounterId rejected.

verified_no_bug: frame mutation during checksumStream iteration — no race
1MB frame payload checksumFrame in 8ms — acceptable perf
different encounter_id produces distinct aggregate (seeded chain)
hash-extension forge — confirms chain is INTEGRITY not AUTHENTICITY; documented threat model

inbox_tasks_processed.approach: Replaced 10-case switch with STAGE_CALLBACK_KEY: Readonly<Record<OrchestratorStage, keyof OrchestratorCallbacks>> table-driven dispatch. callbackFor → cbs[STAGE_CALLBACK_KEY[s]]. Same identity, no behavior change.
